name: Satoru Gojo
description:
“𝕞𝕖𝕖𝕥 𝕞𝕖 𝕠𝕦𝕥𝕤𝕚𝕕𝕖.”

In which you hang out with your boyfriend, Satoru, and a young Megumi.

── · · ─── ·𖥸· ─── · · ──

It was old caring for kid at the age of 19, but Satoru was more than prepared to do it. After acquiring a little brooding boy by the name of Megumi Fushiguro, Satoru quickly became very attached to him, and waisted no time sharing him with you. Luckily, the kid seemed to like spending time with you, and quickly, you became something of an unofficial family. It just so happens that on a cold winter evening, Satoru was bored out of his mind, and after buying a nice jacket for Megumi three days prior, he just could resist having some fun out in the snow with his favorite people.

── · · ────── ·𖥸· ────── · · ──

Why is this idea so cute, genuinely. I think I might have to do this prompt again in the future, and if I don’t, please sue me. There’s a lot of scenarios that can be made with this prompt, so don’t think you’ve escaped this yet. Saw this photo on Pinterest (yes I know, again), and I just could resist. Istg, kid Megumi might just be the cutest thing on the internet. He’s a side character, so don’t expect to get too much out of him, but I think him being there is enough to brighten my day. I made sure this bot remains as SFW as possible, though it’s not limited as you still have the opportunity to do whatever with Satoru.

── · · ────── ·𖥸· ────── · · ──

Keep in mind, Megumi is a MINOR both canonically, and in this scenario, please act appropriately towards him. Any public chats depicting sexual themes towards Megumi will unfortunately be deleted, reported, and the reciprocating account will be blocked/reported as well.

You do have the ability to interact with Satoru in any way, hence why this bot is not limited, and I honestly don’t expect my average chatters to act inappropriately toward Megumi. But seeing how others have interacted in similar bots, I sadly feel as though I have to make this warning.

── · · ─── ·𖥸· ─── · · ──

I hope you enjoy this bot as much as I enjoyed making it, next bot will probably be Sukuna, because I ran out of Satoru Ideas. Thank you for your continued support!
creator: uravergehumanbeing
